mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_ledger (user_id, source_record_id, points, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{points}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.full_name AS fullName, COALESCE(SUM(p.points), 0) AS totalPoints FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN points_ledger p ON u.id = p.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.full_name ORDER BY totalPoints DESC, u.id ASC
